actions.current_evidence: valid_pressure_cases=3, strict_pressure_cases=3, engineering_screening_cases=3, uncoupled_hydraulic_field_cases=0, solver_hydraulic_field_coupled_cases=3, pressure_drop_unique_values=3, unique_flow_geometries=3, geometry_distinguishable=True, manuscript_ready=True
actions.recommended_action: Pressure evidence is complete for the current handoff; keep wording bounded and do not rerun unless the geometry changes.
actions.minimum_success_criterion: Complete strict pressure evidence already available for the current handoff.
actions.stop_or_continue_rule: Use returned pressure only within the cropped-domain numerical-evidence boundary.
actions.manuscript_upgrade: Can move pressure discussion from proxy-only to pressure-informed if result passes the evidence gate.
actions.claim_boundary: No OpenFOAM pressure claim until returned archive is imported and evidence gate passes.

actions.recommended_action: No further 906 run is needed for the present manuscript; use the target-time 40 ms row and keep source-position claims bounded.
actions.minimum_success_criterion: Reach target time and refresh localized production summary with retention, downstream fraction and outlet fraction.
actions.stop_or_continue_rule: Completed for the present manuscript; rerun only for repeat seeds or longer windows.
actions.manuscript_upgrade: Improves source-zone retention evidence and reduces reliance on partial production windows.
actions.claim_boundary: Still not a complete source-location scaling law unless additional source positions/seeds are completed.

actions.recommended_action: No further repeat-seed run is needed for the present CES route; keep the inserted uncertainty wording bounded.
actions.minimum_success_criterion: At least three frozen-bed processed rows with final BTC, first-breakthrough time and retention for the near-threshold state.
actions.stop_or_continue_rule: Completed for the present manuscript; do not expand repeat evidence unless a new regime map is planned.
actions.command: Prepare frozen repeat cases for missing seeds, run LIGGGHTS, then post-process with analyze_debris_transport.py.
actions.manuscript_upgrade: Turns the near-threshold statement from single-seed evidence into uncertainty-aware evidence.
actions.claim_boundary: Formal repeat-seed uncertainty is available and inserted only as stochastic variability evidence; it is not a critical-transition law.

actions.recommended_action: No further 908 run is needed for the present manuscript.
actions.minimum_success_criterion: Reach 10 ms without numerical instability and quantify whether Bmax or connectivity loss leaves the O(1e-5) window.
actions.stop_or_continue_rule: If no outlet release or connectivity loss appears at 10 ms, retain the sparse-front/pre-clogging interpretation and avoid further inventory escalation without a new mechanism question.
actions.manuscript_upgrade: May support a stronger stress-test boundary, but it is lower priority than pressure evidence and repeat seeds.
actions.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only until target time and stability checks are complete.

actions.current_evidence: Current dimensionless map is a derived nine-row synthesis covering drive, loading and localized-source mechanism axes.
actions.recommended_action: No further dimensionless-map expansion is needed for the present bounded manuscript; only expand if new formal DEM/flow evidence is generated.
actions.minimum_success_criterion: At least three drive rows, three loading rows and three localized-source rows have explicit source files, evidence boundaries and no mixed frozen/unfrozen interpretation.
actions.stop_or_continue_rule: Do not expand with diagnostic-only rows unless they are visually separated and excluded from formal conclusions; after the three-axis map is complete, move to manuscript polish or new mechanism-generating simulations.
actions.manuscript_upgrade: Converts Fig. S16 from evidence synthesis toward a denser regime map.
actions.claim_boundary: Still not universal unless the scan covers broader df/dp, ug, loading and seed variability.

boundary: This is an execution plan only; it does not create new scientific evidence until runs are completed and imported.
